events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the closed system with no thermal expansion tank is a code violation (IPC 504.7 / IRC P2804.7) and a real hazard — unrelieved thermal expansion forces the T&P relief valve to cycle repeatedly, accelerating its failure and risking overpressure damage to the tank/fittings. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, with immediate action being installation of a properly sized and pre-charged expansion tank before the unit can be returned to service.
